title: diplostemon octandrus
intro: Diplostemon octandrus, a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae, is commonly known as Groundsel. It is a biennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat digestive issues and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Groundsel include its potential to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Groundsel is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use, although its use should be approached with caution due to potential side effects and interactions with other medications.
